title: atriplex canescens var. gigantea
intro: Atriplex canescens var. gigantea, also known as big sagebrush, is a perennial shrub native to the Southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of big sagebrush include relief from colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of big sagebrush include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote relaxation.
